content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I have identified the neighbour atoms of atom 4 (C:4):

## Results

**Atom 4 (C) has the following neighbour atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 2 | O (Oxygen) |
| 3 | C (Carbon) |
| 5 | C (Carbon) |
| 58 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 9870

The carbon atom (C:4) has four covalent bonds: to an oxygen atom (O:2), two other carbon atoms (C:3 and C:5), and one hydrogen atom (H:58), which is consistent with the typical tetravalent bonding of carbon.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 4, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
